Off Calendar Nov-03-2022 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES (VIA ZOOM VIDEOCONFERENCE):
Atty. BETSEY J. JEFFERY, Esq. of Carroll, Kelly, Trotter & Franzen (Tel: 562-432-5855) for defendants Austin Davis, D.C. & Life Chiropractic SF;
No other appearances made in this matter.

HEARING RE: PLAINTIFF GREGORY SHAPAZIAN's Motion To Substitute Estate Gregory Shapazian For Deceased Plaintiff Gregory Shapazian.

Matter not contested/argued. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

The unopposed "motion to substitute estate Gregory Shapazian for deceased plaintiff Gregory Shapazian" is granted.

Counsel for the prevailing party is required to prepare and submit a proposed order which states that the motion was not opposed.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr.; Clerk: Sean Kane; Not Reported. (302/RBU)
